caption: A man is seated in a podcast studio, wearing a white button-down shirt with tan suspenders, a red bowtie, glasses, and a tall, silver-grey wig. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a black microphone positioned in front of him. The background consists of a white wall adorned with numerous small, framed photographs. To the right, a white garment bag is visible with "LEE" printed on it. On-screen graphics appear on both sides of the frame; on the left is a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST," and on the right is text that reads "BOSS TALK 101." Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking and gesturing slightly with his head as he addresses someone off-camera. His facial expressions shift slightly as he talks, but the overall setting and his attire remain constant throughout the clip.
